title: PM Workfront Schedule Drillthrough
objective: Add frontend-only row-level drillthrough from the PM workfront to the existing promoted PM drivers, schedule, tracer, and variance routes using existing task context and return-path conventions, without touching backend endpoints, schema, auth, ingress, or mutation scope.
orchestration_inputs: PM Lane 012 remains the deployment gate for hosted mutation-seam parity and live PM proof.

Read-only scout 019e2c83-d777-7941-bcde-6b443e6a003d confirmed the smallest Workfront schedule-drillthrough implementation uses existing route-navigation helpers, optional row task_id, and focused PM workfront Playwright assertions.
constrained_outputs: WorkfrontRow accepts optional task_id for frontend drillthrough context.
PM workfront rows expose compact links to drivers, schedule, tracer, and variance.
Generated links preserve returnTo=/pm-review/workfront and returnLabel=PM workfront.
Tracer links include taskId, taskLabel, and maxDepth=10.
Variance links preserve projectId=stack-dc and focusTaskId when task_id exists.
Focused Playwright proof asserts the new URLs while keeping existing read-only history and mutation-sentinel expectations.
validation_steps: CI=1 corepack pnpm --dir C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform --filter @apex/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-workfront.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: focused PM workfront Playwright proof passed 1/1 after rebuilding and forcing a fresh smoke server path with CI=1
initial Playwright attempt failed against a stale reused next start process before rebuild; no product defect remained after fresh build validation
sql_permission_note: Packet 2026-05-15-pm-lane-013 is frontend-only and does not authorize SQL writes, schema migration, live data mutation, auth widening, ingress widening, schedule mutation, assignment mutation, Vercel promotion, or Render deployment action.
